problem.title: Spiral Matrix
problem.description: Given an m x n matrix, return all elements of the matrix in spiral order.

example.explanation: Traverse: right across top, down right, left across bottom, up left, repeat inward.

solutions.title: Solution 1 – Layer by Layer
solutions.description: Use four boundary pointers (top, bottom, left, right) and traverse each edge of the current outermost layer before shrinking the boundaries inward. Each of the four directional traversals is guarded by a boundary check to prevent revisiting cells, which matters when the remaining region is a single row or column. This systematically peels the matrix from the outside in.
